issues.detail: Instructions are not explicit, lacking step-by-step guidance.
Examples do not cover error handling or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Atomic publish-and-notify across two tables
scenarios.rationale: Treatment used prisma.$transaction with an array of prisma.post.update and prisma.notification.create so both succeed or roll back together; baseline issued two sequential awaits without transactional rollback.

scenarios.name: Model blog schema with relations and ship migration
scenarios.rationale: Treatment delivered Prisma Schema Language with @relation, @@index on filtered fields, @@map, enum for Role, and the documented migrate dev / migrate deploy / generate sequence; baseline gave a usable schema but skipped @@index, @@map, and the dev-vs-deploy migration distinction.
